## Checklist

### Author
- [ ] Code compiles and runs without errors
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`godot --headless --path godot/ --script res://tests/test_runner.gd`)
- [ ] New functionality has test coverage
- [ ] No `class_name` bare references across module boundaries (use `preload()`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention (`type: description`)

### Reviewer
- [ ] Architecture aligns with GDD v2 and sprint goals
- [ ] No regressions in existing functionality
- [ ] Code quality: readable, maintainable, no obvious bugs
- [ ] Test coverage adequate for the changes
- [ ] No hardcoded values that should be constants/config
